prompt: A refined Chinese ink-painting style portrait on aged parchment, composed like a classical literati hanging scroll with muted sepia, tan, charcoal, and faded indigo tones. In the center stands a scholarly male figure in flowing dark blue-black Hanfu robes with intricate gold-patterned trim and wide cream inner sleeves, posed front-facing with a dignified stance. His face is intentionally obscured by a rectangular blurred block, while his hair is dark, wavy, and neatly styled. He holds a stitched traditional-style book against his chest with a vertical cover inscription that includes the large Latin letters "XAI" and 4 Chinese text columns beneath it. His other hand rests on an ornate armillary sphere set on a carved pedestal at the lower left. Behind him is a monumental shanshui landscape of 1 mountain range, layered mist, rocky peaks, and drifting clouds, rendered with fine brushwork in an old master style. In the upper right sky area, place 1 bold modern "XAI" logo with the stylized emblem above the letters, and to the far right include 1 slender rocket launching upward beside a launch tower, with smoke billowing into the clouds, blending futuristic aerospace imagery into the classical scene. On the upper left, add 1 vertical column group of Chinese calligraphy title text in black ink, plus 1 smaller vertical signature line and 2 red seal stamps beneath it. The overall effect should fuse ancient Chinese scholar portraiture with space-age technology and AI symbolism, highly detailed, elegant, balanced, and slightly satirical, with the texture of antique paper and the composition of a museum-quality scroll painting.
translatedPrompt: 一幅精致的中国水墨风格肖像，绘制于陈旧的羊皮纸上，构图仿照古典文人挂轴，色调为柔和的深褐色、棕褐色、炭灰色和褪色的靛蓝色。画面中央站立着一位学者，身着飘逸的深蓝黑色汉服，饰有精致的金色纹样和宽大的米色内袖，正面站姿，神态庄重。他的面部被一个矩形模糊块刻意遮挡，头发乌黑且呈波浪状，梳理得整整齐齐。他怀中抱着一本线装传统书籍，封面垂直印有醒目的拉丁字母“XAI”，下方配有 4 列中文字符。他的另一只手搁在左下方雕花底座上的华丽浑天仪上。背景是宏伟的山水景观，包含 1 座山脉、层叠的云雾、嶙峋的山峰和漂浮的云朵，以大师级的细腻笔触呈现。在右上方的天空区域，放置 1 个醒目的现代“XAI”标志，字母上方带有风格化的徽标；在最右侧，包含 1 枚细长的火箭正从发射塔旁升空，烟雾缭绕至云间，将未来感的航空航天意象融入古典场景中。在左上方，添加 1 组垂直排列的黑色水墨书法标题，外加 1 行较小的垂直签名和下方的 2 枚红色印章。整体效果旨在将中国古代学者肖像与太空时代科技及 AI 象征意义融合，细节丰富、优雅平衡且略带讽刺意味，呈现出古董纸张的质感和博物馆级卷轴画的构图。

breakdown.creativeCore: 融合 XAI 主题的中国古代学者：此提示词旨在生成一幅仿古中国卷轴画，将身着长袍的学者肖像与 XAI 品牌、火箭发射以及学术科学符号巧妙融合。
breakdown.subject: 文字符号
breakdown.bestUse: 电影海报、音乐封面、书籍封面、播客封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: front-facing, layered, vertical]。

Visual style:
[媒介/渲染方式/审美方向/色彩系统]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
